justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the next sequential day as an alternative, even after many consecutive days were unavailable, instead of offering a wider range of options or different contact mediums sooner.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in many unnecessary turns by checking availability day-by-day, even after it became clear that phone meetings for investing were fully booked for an extended period.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of checking one day at a time, leading to a long conversation with no resolution.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest a wider range of dates or alternative contact methods earlier in the conversation led to a very inefficient and frustrating experience for the user.
